arts.ttl: Real Sociedad vs Barcelona: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Barcelona face Real Sociedad on the road in La Liga. Preview includes team news, predicted lineups and more.

arts.ttl: Official: Barcelona star left out of squad to face Real Sociedad
arts.sum: Barcelona star Héctor Fort has not been included in the club’s travelling squad for their upcoming meeting with Real Sociedad. Hansi Flick’s troops are of course primed to return to…

arts.ttl: Hansi Flick makes call to discard Barcelona star as midfield option
arts.sum: Earlier in the season, Barcelona were seriously lacking midfield options. At one stage, Hansi Flick only had Marc Casado and Pedri for the pivot positions in his system, as he was without the services of Frenkie de Jong, Gavi and Marc Bernal because of injury. Because of this, Eric Garcia was drafted in as a […] The post Hansi Flick makes call to discard Barcelona star as midfield option appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: Contact made: Man United initiate move to sign 28-year-old Barcelona target
arts.sum: Bayer Leverkusen defender Jonathan Tah has been linked with a move away from the Bundesliga club. According to Fichajes, Manchester United and Barcelona have made contact for his signing. The 28-year-old German international is an attractive prospect because of his contract situation. He will be a free agent next summer, and it is no surprise […] The post Contact made: Man United initiate move to sign 28-year-old Barcelona target appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Sunday's La Liga predictions including Real Sociedad vs. Barcelona
arts.sum: Sports Mole provides score predictions and previews for all of today's La Liga fixtures, including Real Sociedad vs. Barcelona.

arts.ttl: Barcelona Predicted Lineup vs. Real Sociedad: La Liga
arts.sum: Barcelona will be eager to continue its early domination of La Liga before the international break.

arts.ttl: Celtic offer update on Barca loanee Alex Valle’s future
arts.sum: Celtic boss Brendan Rodgers has rejected claims that Barcelona could try to recall Alex Valle from his season-long loan in the January transfer window. Valle is enjoying life at Celtic after moving in the summer, and Rodgers says he does not want him to go anywhere.

arts.ttl: ‘It’s a joy to watch Barca play’ -Aguacil piles praise on Flick’s side
arts.sum: Real Sociedad manager Imanol Alguacil has been full of praise for Hansi Flick’s Barcelona ahead of tomorrow’s La Liga clash with the Catalans . Barca head into the game on a superb run of form and face a Real Sociedad team that have only managed one home win all season.

arts.ttl: Hansi Flick called another Barcelona youngster up to first-team training before Sociedad
arts.sum: Barcelona head coach Hansi Flick afforded an opportunity to impress to another up-and-coming member of the club’s reserve setup on Saturday. The player in question? Noah Darvich. Barcelona are of…

arts.ttl: Details: Barcelona’s Lamine Yamal blew Arda Güler away in final Kopa Trophy voting
arts.sum: The details of the final voting for last week’s Kopa Trophy have on Saturday been unveiled. And they highlight the absolutely massive gap between winner Lamine Yamal of Barcelona, and…
